projects.title: Customer Onboarding eKYC Platform & NID Integration
projects.description: Six customer-facing identity journeys rebuilt around a national ID verification system, with a four-permutation ownership transfer matrix.

projects.title: Field Agent Onboarding Platform
projects.description: End-to-end onboarding specification across web and mobile channels, covering six role types, three integrated systems, and a legacy migration workflow.

projects.title: Field Team Engagement Platform
projects.description: Three-module platform specification covering in-app notifications, training manual hub, and survey builder with conditional branching logic across mobile and web channels.

projects.title: GPS-Verified Field Activity Tracking
projects.description: Full specification for a GPS-verified field activity system — gate meetings, market visits, 50m dual-device attendance confirmation, and a real-time territory dashboard.

projects.title: KPI Reporting & Field Analytics Platform
projects.description: Specification for real-time sales and operational KPI dashboards with hierarchical drill-down across national, regional, territory, and agent levels.

projects.title: Purchase Order & Inventory Management
projects.description: Vendor-to-in-house migration specification covering four fulfilment pipelines, ERP integration, smart retry logic, and inventory chain of custody.

projects.title: Sales Agent-to-Merchant Assignment Engine
projects.description: Geo-fenced, OTP-verified agent-to-merchant mapping platform with conditional approval logic across three integrated systems.
